name: agency-agents-fork
description: 163 specialist agent personas + 24 routing skills + 16 NEXUS strategy playbooks, packaged as a user-level Claude Code config bundle for Windows (PowerShell installer). Fork of msitarzewski/agency-agents with China-market agents excluded and Korean + Japanese Business Navigators added.

installation.note: This repository is currently a user-level config bundle (copies agents into ~/.claude/agents/ and skills into ~/.claude/skills/ via scripts/install.ps1), NOT yet a packaged Claude Code plugin per the .claude-plugin spec. Plugin loader expects agents/ and skills/ directories at plugin root; here they live in 15 division directories (academic/, design/, engineering/, ...). To use, clone and run scripts/install.ps1. See README.md.
